items.title: Jason Kelce: "Sunday is the NFL . . . we're getting away from that a little bit"
items.summary: The NFL has been slicing games away from Sunday afternoon in an effort to create more standalone windows.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Monday Night Club: What next for relegated West Ham as Spurs survive?
items.summary: Mark Chapman and guests debate this week's football.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Zak Crawley channels England disappointment into match-winning 75*
items.summary: Sussex were 98 for no loss in the eighth over but only ended up posting 197 for 6
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
